termsAndServices.title: Introduction
termsAndServices.content: Welcome to CHYRA (stylized as AЯYHƆ), a dynamic platform designed to connect you with the world in real time. By accessing or using CHYRA, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following terms and services. These terms govern your use of the platform and services, which may include posting content, messaging, and other interactive features. Please read them carefully. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you must not use CHYRA. If you are using the platform on behalf of an organization, you confirm that you have the authority to bind that organization to these terms.

termsAndServices.title: User Responsibilities
termsAndServices.content: As a CHYRA user, you are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password and for all activities under your account. You agree to provide accurate, current information and to update it as necessary. You must not share your credentials, engage in spamming, or harass others. You agree not to impersonate others or post harmful, defamatory, or misleading content. Any activity that occurs under your account is your responsibility. CHYRA is not liable for any loss or damage arising from your failure to comply with these obligations.

termsAndServices.title: Content and Conduct
termsAndServices.content: CHYRA provides a platform for you to share content, including text, images, videos, and links, with other users. By posting content on CHYRA, you grant us a worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use, reproduce, modify, publish, and distribute such content in any media. You agree not to post content that is illegal, harmful, defamatory, or infringes on intellectual property rights. CHYRA reserves the right to remove any content that violates these terms. Repeated violations may result in the suspension or termination of your account. You agree to respect the rights of others and to refrain from any form of harassment, threats, or abusive behavior.

termsAndServices.title: Privacy Policy
termsAndServices.content: Your privacy is important to us at CHYRA. We are committed to protecting your personal information as outlined in our Privacy Policy. By using CHYRA, you consent to the collection, use, and storage of your data as described in the policy. We take reasonable measures to protect your personal information but cannot guarantee absolute security. You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal data in accordance with applicable laws. CHYRA will never share your personal information with third parties without your consent, except as required by law or necessary to provide the services you have requested.

termsAndServices.title: Termination of Service
termsAndServices.content: CHYRA reserves the right to suspend or terminate your access at any time for conduct that violates these terms or is harmful to other users, CHYRA, or third parties. If your account is terminated, you may lose access to any content or data associated with your account. CHYRA is not responsible for any loss of data or content resulting from the termination of your account. If you wish to terminate your account voluntarily, you may do so through the platform. If your account is terminated due to violations, you may be prohibited from rejoining the platform. You can appeal terminations by contacting CHYRA support.

termsAndServices.title: Limitation of Liability
termsAndServices.content: To the fullest extent permitted by law, CHYRA and its affiliates are not liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or any loss of profits, revenues, data, or goodwill, resulting from your access to or use of CHYRA, or inability to access or use CHYRA. This limitation applies regardless of the legal theory under which such damages are sought. In no event will CHYRA's total liability exceed the amount you paid for access to the platform in the six (6) months preceding the claim.

termsAndServices.title: Premium Version Terms
termsAndServices.content: The Premium version of CHYRA includes the following features: Half Ads in For You and Following, Larger reply boost, Get paid to post, Checkmark, and Creator Subscription. By subscribing to Premium, you agree to these additional terms and acknowledge that the features provided are subject to change. CHYRA reserves the right to modify or discontinue Premium features at any time without notice. Your subscription will be automatically renewed unless you cancel it through your account settings. Any changes to the Premium service will be communicated, and continued use constitutes acceptance of updated terms.

termsAndServices.title: Premium+ Version Terms
termsAndServices.content: The Premium+ version of CHYRA includes all features of Premium, plus: No Ads in For You and Following, Largest reply boost, CHYRA Pro, Analytics, Media Studio, and Write articles. By subscribing to Premium+, you agree to these additional terms. CHYRA reserves the right to modify or discontinue Premium+ features at any time without notice. Your subscription will be automatically renewed unless canceled. You may cancel your subscription at any time through your account settings. CHYRA may update these features or discontinue them with prior notice.

termsAndServices.title: Subscription Billing and Cancellation
termsAndServices.content: Subscriptions to Premium and Premium+ are billed on a monthly or annual basis, as selected during the purchase process. You may cancel your subscription at any time through your account settings. Upon cancellation, your subscription will continue until the end of the current billing period. No refunds will be provided for unused portions of the subscription. Changes to pricing or billing terms will be communicated to you in advance.
